argument.generic.1.goodchoice: I'll do better. We're a team.
argument.generic.1.goodreply: A team. Yes. That's all I wanted to hear.
argument.generic.1.intro: I feel like I've been doing all the work to keep us close, and you haven't met me halfway.
argument.generic.1.neutralchoice: I didn't realize you felt that way.
argument.generic.1.neutralreply: Well, now you do. Let's not let it get worse.
argument.generic.2.badchoice: Does it really matter that much?
argument.generic.2.badreply: It matters to me. I thought it mattered to you, too.
argument.generic.2.goodchoice: Too long. Let's fix that this week.
argument.generic.2.goodreply: I'd love that. Thank you for noticing before it was too late.
argument.generic.2.intro: When was the last time we did something together, just the two of us? I honestly can't remember.
argument.generic.2.neutralreply: They always are. We have to make time anyway.
badday.Abigail.flat: Still kinda off today. Not down exactly, just... flat. It'll lift. It always does.
badday.Abigail.opener.0: Feeling restless and off today. Like my skin doesn't fit right. Nothing fixes it. Just gotta ride it out, I guess.
badday.Abigail.opener.1: Bleh. One of those days where everything's gray and nothing's fun. Even adventure sounds boring. Weird, right?
badday.Abigail.recovered: Yesterday was a weird, heavy one. You stuck by me through it. Feeling way more like myself today. Thanks, you.
badday.Alex.flat: Still kinda low today. Not myself. It's not you — just gotta wait it out.
badday.Alex.opener.0: Feelin' low today, and the tough-guy thing won't cover it. Sometimes the old fears just... show up. I hate it.
badday.Alex.opener.1: Bad day, babe. The kind where I feel like that scared kid again. Don't really know how to shake it.
badday.Alex.recovered: Yesterday the heavy stuff caught up with me. You didn't let me hide behind the act. Feelin' a lot better today. Thanks.
badday.Elliott.flat: The gray lingers yet today, I'm afraid. The pages stay blank. It shall pass. Such tides always do.
badday.Elliott.opener.0: A melancholy has settled over me today, heavy and wordless. Even the sea offers no verse. Forgive my gloom.
badday.Elliott.opener.1: The muse has abandoned me and taken my spirits with her. A gray, hollow sort of day. I shall endure it quietly.
badday.Elliott.recovered: Yesterday the melancholy held me fast. Your presence was the light that broke it. The words return. Thank you, my love.
badday.Emily.flat: Still a bit clouded today. The energy's slow to clear. Be gentle with me while it does.
badday.Emily.opener.0: My energy is all tangled and dark today. The colors won't come. I think I just need to sit quietly with it.
badday.Emily.opener.1: The universe feels heavy on me this morning. Some days the static drowns out the song. I'll find the melody again.
badday.Emily.recovered: Yesterday the dark crowded out my light. You sat in it with me until it lifted. Thank you. My colors are dancing again.
badday.Haley.flat: Still kind of in a mood today. It's not you. I'll be cute and charming again tomorrow, promise.
badday.Haley.opener.0: I just feel awful today and I don't even have a good reason and that makes it worse. Ugh. Today is the worst.
badday.Haley.opener.1: Some days I just feel small and grumpy and not myself. Today's one of them. Don't take it personally.
badday.Haley.recovered: Yesterday I was a mess for no reason. You were patient with me anyway. ...That's why it's you. Feeling better today.
badday.Harvey.flat: Still a bit anxious today, rattling around in my own head. It'll pass. It usually does.
badday.Harvey.opener.0: I, ah... my chest feels tight today. The anxious kind. I keep wondering if I'm really enough for you. I'm sorry, it's silly.
badday.Harvey.opener.1: Bad day for the nerves, I'm afraid. My mind won't stop running worst cases. I just need to breathe. And maybe you near.
badday.Harvey.recovered: Yesterday the worry had me good. But you were there, and it quieted. Thank you. I feel steadier today.
badday.Leah.flat: Still feeling a little blocked and low. It happens. It'll break. It always does.
badday.Leah.opener.0: Creative block, low mood — they always come together for me. Today I just feel stuck and sad. I'll work through it.
badday.Leah.opener.1: One of those days where the well runs dry and the gray creeps in. I'll be quiet today. Don't mind me.
badday.Leah.recovered: Yesterday I was stuck in the gray. You pulled me out of my own head. The work's flowing again. Thank you, truly.
badday.Maru.flat: Still operating in a bit of a haze today. It'll resolve. These things usually do.
badday.Maru.opener.0: I can't focus on anything today. My mind keeps spinning its wheels and getting nowhere. It's frustrating. And exhausting.
badday.Maru.opener.1: Bad brain day. Everything feels foggy and just out of reach. No diagnosis, no fix. Just have to wait it out.
badday.Maru.recovered: Yesterday my head was a fog. You helped clear it just by being there. Running at full capacity again. Thank you.
badday.Penny.flat: Still feeling a bit heavy today. It's not you. Some days are just like this for me.
badday.Penny.opener.0: I'm feeling overwhelmed today. Old worries — Mom, money, the trailer years. It all crowds in sometimes. I'm sorry.
badday.Penny.opener.1: Some days the weight of everything just settles on me at once. Today's one of those. I'll be alright. I think.
badday.Penny.recovered: Yesterday everything felt like too much. You helped carry it. I don't know how to thank you for that. I'm better today.
badday.Sam.flat: Still kinda flat today. The funny'll come back, just... not yet. It's not you.
badday.Sam.opener.0: Not feelin' it today, man. Can't even fake the goofball thing. Just kinda... down. Dunno why. It sucks.
badday.Sam.opener.1: Bad day. The music in my head went quiet, y'know? Everything's just gray and flat. Bummer.
badday.Sam.recovered: Yesterday I was way off, no jokes left in me. You stuck around anyway. Feelin' the beat again today. Thanks, seriously.
badday.Sebastian.flat: Still kind of withdrawn today. Give me space and I'll come back around. I always do.
badday.Sebastian.opener.0: ...Not in a talking mood today. Everything feels far away. I'll be down in the basement if you need me. Don't worry about it.
badday.Sebastian.opener.1: Just one of those quiet, gray days. I'm pulling inward. It's not you. I just get like this sometimes.
badday.Sebastian.recovered: Yesterday I went quiet on you. You didn't push, you just stayed. That's exactly what I needed. Thank you.
badday.Shane.flat: Still kinda numb today. Not your fault. Just... one of those stretches.
badday.Shane.opener.0: ...It's one of those days. The heavy kind. Nothing happened, the dark just... rolled back in. Don't mind me.
badday.Shane.opener.1: Woke up under a cloud today. You know the kind. Just gotta get through it. Sorry I'm not better company.
badday.Shane.recovered: Yesterday was rough, but you stuck around. That helped more than you'll ever know. Feeling more like myself today.
badday.generic.flat: Still feeling a bit flat today. It's not you — some days are just like this. It'll pass.
badday.generic.opener.0: I'm just having a rough day today. Nothing happened — I'm low for no reason I can name. I'm sorry.
badday.generic.opener.1: Bad day today. The kind that comes out of nowhere and sits on your chest. I'll be quiet. Don't mind me.
badday.generic.recovered: Yesterday was hard for no good reason, and you stayed with me through it. That meant everything. I feel better today.
birthday.Abigail.addon: ...Also, last anniversary? You kinda spaced on a gift. I'm not bitter. I'm just SAYING. Today's your freebie. Use it.
birthday.Abigail.line: Happy birthday, you! I made you pie for breakfast because rules are fake and it's YOUR day. There's a slice in the fridge. Eat it. That's an order.
birthday.Alex.addon: ...Not gonna lie though, you blanked on our anniversary gift this year. Stung a little. But hey — it's your day. We're good.
birthday.Alex.line: Happy birthday, babe! Made you the full breakfast, champion's fuel, it's in the fridge. Today's all about you. You earned it.
birthday.Elliott.addon: I shall delicately observe that our anniversary drifted past, giftless, like a ship in fog. No matter. The poet forgives. He simply... remembers.
birthday.Elliott.line: Happy birthday, my darling! I rose with the gulls to prepare you a seaside feast — it awaits in the cold-box. May your day be as splendid as you are.
birthday.Emily.addon: I'll gently note the cosmos remembers our anniversary went... ungifted. The universe forgives. And so do I. Mostly.
birthday.Emily.line: Happy birthday, beloved! The stars told me today was special, so I made you something fresh and full of good energy. It's in the fridge. Eat with intention.
birthday.Haley.addon: By the way — you forgot to get me anything on our anniversary. I noticed. I ALWAYS notice. ...You can make it up to me. Cutely.
birthday.Haley.line: Happy birthday, gorgeous! I made you a cake and it's adorable AND delicious, you're welcome. It's in the fridge. Don't you dare skip breakfast.
birthday.Harvey.addon: I don't wish to make a fuss, but our anniversary did go by without a gift this year. I noticed. ...I forgive you, of course. I just noticed.
birthday.Harvey.line: Happy birthday, dear! I, ah, made you a proper omelet — a healthy start to your special day. It's in the fridge. I hope you like it.
birthday.Leah.addon: I'll just mention our anniversary passed with no gift this year. I'm not keeping score... but I do have a very good memory.
birthday.Leah.line: Happy birthday, you. I threw together something fresh and good — it's in the fridge. Nothing fancy, just made with love. Like everything else around here.
birthday.Maru.addon: I will note, for the record, that our anniversary registered zero gifts this year. The variable was you. I'm filing it under 'forgiven, but logged.'
birthday.Maru.line: Happy birthday! I optimized a full nutritionally-balanced breakfast for you — it's in the fridge. Statistically the best way to start your special day.
birthday.Penny.addon: I did notice our anniversary slipped by without a gift this year... I'm not upset, truly. I just hope I matter to you the way you matter to me.
birthday.Penny.line: Happy birthday, my love. I woke early and made you pancakes — they're in the fridge, still warm if you hurry. I just wanted today to feel special for you.
birthday.Sam.addon: Okay so, tiny thing — you totally forgot our anniversary gift this year, haha. It's cool! It's cool. ...It was a little uncool. But it's cool.
birthday.Sam.line: HAPPY BIRTHDAY! I made you a giant stack of pancakes, dude, they're in the fridge. It's your day, we're celebrating, no arguments!
birthday.Sebastian.addon: ...Also, you forgot our anniversary gift this year. I'm not gonna make a thing of it. Just — noticed, is all. It's your day. Forget I said it.
birthday.Sebastian.line: Hey. Happy birthday. I, uh, got up early and left pizza in the fridge for you. Breakfast pizza. Don't argue, it's the superior breakfast. Enjoy it.
birthday.Shane.addon: Look, I gotta say it — you blanked on our anniversary gift this year. Hurt a little, not gonna lie. But it's your day. So we're square. Eat up.
birthday.Shane.line: Happy birthday. I, uh, made you pepper poppers for breakfast. It's the one thing I'm good at. They're in the fridge. ...Hope you like 'em.
birthday.generic.addon: I'll gently mention our anniversary passed without a gift this year. I'm not upset... but I did notice. Just so you know.
birthday.generic.line: Happy birthday, my love! I got up early and made you a special breakfast — it's waiting in the fridge. Today is all about you.

birthdaygift.Elliott: Happy birthday, my darling! In place of a feast, I offer something more practical: {0}. May it serve you well today.
birthdaygift.Emily: Happy birthday, beloved! The universe whispered that you'd need a little extra energy today, so I left {0} for you. Use it well.
birthdaygift.Haley: Happy birthday! Okay, I know I usually do something cute, but I thought {0} would actually be useful today. You're welcome.
birthdaygift.Harvey: Happy birthday, dear. I thought {0} might be more useful for you today than something heavy. Take care of yourself out there.
birthdaygift.Leah: Happy birthday, you. Thought you could use {0} more than something fancy today. Simple, but it's yours.
birthdaygift.Maru: Happy birthday! I calculated that {0} would be the most statistically useful gift for your day, so here it is. Enjoy!
birthdaygift.Penny: Happy birthday, my love. I thought something practical might help you more today, so I left {0} for you. I hope it makes your day a little easier.
birthdaygift.Sam: Happy birthday, dude! Skipped the usual breakfast thing and got you {0} instead. Thought it'd come in handy!

birthdaygift.Shane: Happy birthday. Didn't make breakfast this time — left you {0} instead. Thought it might come in handy. Hope you have a good one.

child.ask.0: {child} has been asking for you. Could you spend a little time with them today?
child.ask.1: Would you sit with the kids for a while today? It would mean the world to {child}.
child.ask.2: The little one misses you when you're in the fields all day. Make some time today?
child.concern.0: ...{child} asked if we were okay. Kids notice things, you know. It worries me.
child.concern.1: I don't want {child} growing up feeling the tension between us. Please, let's fix this.
child.concern.2: {child} has been quiet lately. I think they can tell something's wrong with us.
child.engage.0: Look at them light up. Thank you for this — it matters more than you know.
child.engage.1: That's exactly the kind of parent I hoped you'd be. The kids are lucky. So am I.
child.warm.0: {child} said the funniest thing this morning. I wish you'd been there to hear it.
child.warm.1: I caught {child} trying to copy the way you walk. We're raising a little you, you know.
child.warm.2: The kids adore you. {child} asked when you'd be home before you even left.
child.warm.3: Watching you with {child} yesterday... that's the happiest I think I've ever been.
chore.fallback: I helped out around the farm a little this morning.
chore.high.collect.0: I cleared out the coop and the barn and shipped everything for you. We make a good team, don't we?
chore.high.collect.1: Collected from all the animals and got it in the bin. Figured I'd handle it so you could rest a little.
chore.high.cook.0: I made you a proper meal and left it in the fridge. Put real love into it. Eat well today, okay?
chore.high.cook.1: There's a hot dish waiting in the fridge — your favorite. I wanted to take care of you today.
chore.high.forage.0: I walked the whole farm and gathered everything worth keeping — good stuff, too. It's all in the chest for you.
chore.high.forage.1: Collected a chest's worth of nice forage from around the place. Thought it might be useful, love.
chore.high.gold.0: I tidied up and found a nice little sum tucked away. Left it on the table — consider it a gift.
chore.high.gold.1: Found some extra gold sorting through things. It's on the table. You work so hard, you've earned a treat.
chore.high.water.0: I watered all the crops near the house this morning — wanted to take some weight off you. I love this life we're building.
chore.high.water.1: Got up early and watered a good stretch of the field for you. Anything to make your day easier, love.
chore.low.collect.0: I grabbed a couple things from the animals and tossed them in the bin. Small thing.
chore.low.collect.1: Collected a bit from the coop and shipped it. Saved you a trip.
chore.low.cook.0: I left a little something in the fridge in case you get hungry.
chore.low.cook.1: There's a bite to eat in the fridge. Nothing fancy.
chore.low.forage.0: I picked up a few odds and ends from around the farm and put them in a chest.
chore.low.forage.1: Tidied up some forage lying around and stashed it for you.
chore.low.gold.0: Oh — I found some extra change around the house. Left it on the table for you.
chore.low.gold.1: Found a bit of loose change and set it on the table. Treat yourself.
chore.low.water.0: I gave a few of the crops near the house a little water this morning. Just helping out.
chore.low.water.1: Watered some of the closest plants for you. Don't strain yourself today.
dream.Abigail.0: I dreamt we were spelunking in a cave made of candy and fought a marshmallow golem. We WON. Obviously. Best dream ever.
dream.Abigail.1: There was a dungeon under our house — like, infinite levels — and we just kept going down, holding hands, beating everything. Couple goals.
dream.Abigail.2: I dreamt I was a sword and you were the hero who wielded me and honestly that's the most romantic thing my brain has ever produced.
dream.Abigail.3: We rode a giant purple bat over the whole valley and everyone was so jealous. The bat's name was Gerald. It's always Gerald.
dream.Abigail.4: I dreamt the mines went all the way to another world and we moved there and opened a haunted snack shop. It was thriving.
dream.Abigail.5: There was a quest where I had to find the 'most annoying noble' to save the realm and it was just... you, being cute. Quest complete.
dream.Abigail.6: We were ghosts but the fun kind, haunting a castle and rearranging the furniture to spook people. Married goals, honestly.
dream.Abigail.7: I dreamt we found a secret door behind the fridge and on the other side was just... more us. Infinite us. The best kind of horror.
dream.Alex.0: I dreamt I scored the winning goal and the whole crowd faded out, and the only one in the stands was you, cheering. That's the dream that matters.
dream.Alex.1: Last night we were just tossing a ball on the beach, no game, no score, golden light. I woke up wanting that more than any trophy.
dream.Alex.2: I dreamt I was old and gray, telling some kid about the best thing I ever did. Wasn't gridball. It was marrying you.
dream.Alex.3: There was a dream where I wasn't scared of anything, and I figured out it was 'cause you were standing next to me the whole time.
dream.Alex.4: I dreamt we had a whole house full of noise and dogs and good food and you in the middle of it. Best future I've ever seen.
dream.Alex.5: Last night I dreamed I could fly, and the first thing I did was come find you to show you. Some things don't change, sleeping or awake.
dream.Alex.6: I dreamt grandpa was proud of me. And you were holding my hand while he said it. Woke up with my eyes wet. Don't tell anyone.
dream.Alex.7: There was a championship in the dream, and I held up the trophy and pointed it right at you. You're the reason I win anything.
dream.Elliott.0: I dreamt of a grand ballroom drowned beneath the sea, and we danced there among the corals while fish bore witness to our love.
dream.Elliott.1: Last night I lived a chapter set in a lighthouse at the world's end. You climbed the stairs to me, and the lamp had nothing on your light.
dream.Elliott.2: We sailed a ship of paper across an ink-black ocean, and every wave whispered a line of verse I had written about you.
dream.Elliott.3: I dreamt I was a king who traded his entire kingdom for one more evening at your side, and I called it the wisest bargain in all the realm.
dream.Elliott.4: There was a library that stretched to the horizon, every book about us. I read until dawn and woke certain ours is the finest tale of all.
dream.Elliott.5: We wandered an endless autumn garden where the leaves fell upward, and you laughed, and I understood at last what poets mean by 'home.'
dream.Elliott.6: I dreamt the tide carried a message in a bottle to my feet. I opened it. It simply read your name, a thousand times, in my own hand.
dream.Elliott.7: We stood atop a cliff as a storm performed for us alone. You were unafraid, and so, beside you, was I.
dream.Emily.0: I dreamt our souls were two threads of light weaving a tapestry across the whole night sky. The universe was the loom; we were the pattern.
dream.Emily.1: Last night I danced with you on the surface of a still black lake, the stars dancing with us. A memory from a future life, I think.
dream.Emily.2: I dreamt every crystal in the world chimed your name at once, and the sound was so beautiful I wept in my sleep with joy.
dream.Emily.3: There was a garden where flowers bloomed in colors that don't exist yet, and each one opened as you passed. You make the world unfold.
dream.Emily.4: I dreamt we were two comets who chose, against all physics, to share a single orbit forever. The cosmos approved.
dream.Emily.5: Last night the aurora came down and wrapped around us like a shawl, and I understood that love is just energy that refuses to fade.
dream.Emily.6: I dreamt of a temple of light where the only prayer was your name, and I prayed it gladly, endlessly, until dawn.
dream.Emily.7: There was a sea of stars and we waded in up to our hearts. You glowed. You always glow. Even my dreams know it.
dream.Haley.0: I dreamt we were on a magazine cover and honestly? We looked incredible. Power couple. I woke up smug about it.
dream.Haley.1: There was a beach made entirely of glitter and you carried all my bags without complaining. Truly the dream of dreams.
dream.Haley.2: I dreamt I won an award for 'Most Photogenic Marriage' and gave a tearful speech about you. ...Don't let it go to your head.
dream.Haley.3: We were models walking some runway and I tripped and you caught me and somehow that made it MORE glamorous. Iconic.
dream.Haley.4: I dreamt our whole house was made of sunlight and there was a camera that only took flattering pictures. Perfect. Like you.
dream.Haley.5: There was a party where everyone was boring except you, so we left and it was way better. Story of our actual life, honestly.
dream.Haley.6: I dreamt you proposed all over again but with way better lighting. I said yes louder this time.
dream.Haley.7: We were on a yacht and the sunset matched my outfit exactly and you said something sweet. ...Okay, fine, it was a good dream.
dream.Harvey.0: I dreamt I'd lost you in a crowded station, searching every platform — and then there you were, and the panic became pure relief.
dream.Harvey.1: Last night I was giving a lecture and forgot every word, but you were in the front row mouthing them to me. I got through it. Because of you.
dream.Harvey.2: I dreamt the clinic was flooding and I couldn't save everyone, and then you took my hand and the water just... stilled. I could breathe.
dream.Harvey.3: There was a plane I was meant to fly and I was terrified, until I saw you in the copilot's seat. Then the sky felt safe.
dream.Harvey.4: I dreamt I was late for something terribly important, running and running — and it turned out the important thing was just coming home to you.
dream.Harvey.5: Last night the worry had me in its grip, as it does, and then I heard you humming in the next room and the whole dream went warm and gold.
dream.Harvey.6: I dreamt I had to give a toast and my hands shook — until you squeezed them under the table. I've never spoken so steadily.
dream.Harvey.7: There was a long dark corridor and I was afraid of what was at the end. It was you, holding tea, asking how my day was.
dream.Leah.0: I dreamt of a meadow at golden hour, and I tried to paint it, but you kept stepping into frame, and the painting got better every time.
dream.Leah.1: Last night the whole forest was hung with paper lanterns and we walked beneath them, and the light pooled in your hair like honey.
dream.Leah.2: I dreamt my sculptures came alive and the only one that could speak just kept saying how much it loved you. I'd made it in your image, of course.
dream.Leah.3: There was a cabin in the dream, snowed in and warm, wine and woodsmoke and you. I'd have happily never been found.
dream.Leah.4: I dreamt of a river that ran with watercolor, and we floated down it on a raft of canvas, painting the banks as we passed.
dream.Leah.5: Last night autumn never ended. Leaves the color of fire, the smell of rain, and you, sketched into every scene I dreamed.
dream.Leah.6: I dreamt I gave a gallery show and every piece was just you, in a hundred lights, and the critics finally understood what beauty meant.
dream.Leah.7: There was a field of tall grass and we lay in it until the stars came out, and I didn't reach for a single brush. I just looked at you.
dream.Maru.0: I dreamt we built a rocket in the backyard and flew it to a little moon that was just for us. The fuel was, scientifically, love. Don't laugh.
dream.Maru.1: Last night I dreamed of a lab where every experiment kept concluding the same thing: that I'm completely in love with you. Reproducible results.
dream.Maru.2: I dreamt I invented a machine that could bottle a feeling, and the first one I caught was the way you look at me. I never opened it. Too precious.
dream.Maru.3: There was an observatory in the dream and we found a new star and I named it after you, and this time the committee approved.
dream.Maru.4: I dreamt the whole valley ran on a tiny engine I built, and it was powered entirely by how happy you make me. Endless energy. Checks out.
dream.Maru.5: Last night I dreamed in equations, and every one of them solved to you. Math has never been so romantic.
dream.Maru.6: I dreamt we were astronauts and I got tangled in the tether and you reeled me back in, laughing. You're always my way home.
dream.Maru.7: There was a dream where I cured something impossible, and the first person I told was you, and your face was better than any award.
dream.Penny.0: I dreamt of a little garden behind our home, and we tended it together, and everything we planted grew. It felt like a promise.
dream.Penny.1: Last night I dreamed of a quiet rainy afternoon, just us and a stack of books and the kettle. I woke up wishing I could stay there.
dream.Penny.2: I dreamt our home was full of soft lamplight and laughter, and I understood that this — peace — was a thing I was allowed to have.
dream.Penny.3: There was a long table set for a holiday, and it was full, and warm, and ours. I've never felt so safe, even in sleep.
dream.Penny.4: I dreamt we walked a country road at dusk, your hand in mine, and neither of us hurried. There was nowhere we needed to be but together.
dream.Penny.5: Last night I dreamed of teaching a little classroom while you waved from the window. A small, ordinary, perfect life. I hope it's a glimpse.
dream.Penny.6: I dreamt the trailer years were just a story I read once, and this — you, this home — was the truth I'd been waiting to wake up into.
dream.Penny.7: There was a fireplace and a blanket and your steady heartbeat under my ear. I didn't want morning to come at all.
dream.Sam.0: I dreamt our band finally hit it big, and the encore was just me dedicating every single song to you. Crowd went wild. You went red. Cute.
dream.Sam.1: Last night we toured the whole valley in a van that ran on snacks and good vibes, and you were my roadie AND my favorite groupie.
dream.Sam.2: I dreamt I wrote the perfect song and the only lyric was your name, and somehow it went number one. The critics wept. So did I.
dream.Sam.3: There was a dream where we had a treehouse with a half-pipe and never had to grow up, but we were also married, so, best of both worlds.
dream.Sam.4: I dreamt I taught you to skate and you immediately did a trick I can't even do, and I was so proud I forgot to be jealous. Mostly.
dream.Sam.5: Last night we played a rooftop show as the sun came up and nobody was watching but you, and that was the best gig of my whole life.
dream.Sam.6: I dreamt our kitchen was a recording studio and we made a whole album just goofing around. Title track was the sound of you laughing.
dream.Sam.7: There was a dream where I finally felt like a real grown-up, and it was just because you looked at me like I already was one.
dream.Sebastian.0: I dreamt we were on the bike, no destination, just a black highway and a sky full of stars. You held on and I never wanted to stop.

letter.Abigail.3: YO,^Found a rock shaped exactly like your face and I'm keeping it on the windowsill forever. It's not as cute as you though.^- Abby
letter.Abigail.4: Hey,^I've decided we're nocturnal now. Just us. The town can deal. Stay up with me tonight, it'll be great, trust me.^- Abby

letter.Alex.0: Hey babe,^Just wanted you to know I'm thinking about you. That's it. That's the note. ...Love you.^- Alex
letter.Alex.1: Babe,^You make the hard stuff easier. Don't know how. Glad you do.^- Alex
letter.Alex.2: Hey,^Be safe out there. Come home to me. That's all I ask.^- Alex
letter.Alex.3: Babe,^I'm not great with words. But you're it for me. Always.^- Alex
letter.Alex.4: Hey you,^Proud to call you mine. Tell everybody, honestly. Wanna shout it.^- Alex
letter.Alex.5: Babe,^Best part of my day is the front door opening. Every single time.^- Alex
letter.Alex.6: Hey,^You believe in me. Nobody really did before. Means everything.^- Alex
letter.Alex.7: Babe,^Whatever I become, it's because you saw me first. Thank you. Love you.^- Alex
letter.Elliott.0: My beloved,^Dawn broke this morning as though it had something to prove, and still it could not rival the way you say my name.^Eternally yours,^Elliott
letter.Elliott.1: My darling,^I have written ten thousand words today and discarded them all, for none could hold what a single glance from you contains.^With boundless devotion,^Elliott
letter.Elliott.2: My muse,^The sea grows jealous, I think, of how often my thoughts wander from its shores to the harbor of your arms.^Forever,^Elliott
letter.Elliott.3: My love,^Last night I dreamt our story bound in leather on every shelf in every land, and woke gladder still to simply live it.^Yours always,^Elliott
letter.Elliott.4: Beloved,^You are the comma in my breathless sentence, the rest in my frantic music. Beside you, I finally slow.^Adoringly,^Elliott
letter.Elliott.5: My darling,^Were I to spend a lifetime cataloguing your wonders, I should die mid-list, content and woefully incomplete.^Devotedly,^Elliott
letter.Elliott.6: My love,^The gulls cried your name this morning. I am certain of it. I have begun a sonnet defending their good sense.^Yours,^Elliott
letter.Elliott.7: My muse,^Come find me by the water, where the only thing more endless than the tide is what I feel for you.^Always and ever,^Elliott
letter.Emily.0: Beloved,^The crystals were singing when I woke, a clear bright note. It was your name, I'm certain. The universe knows.^- Emily
letter.Emily.1: My love,^Your aura left warmth in the doorway this morning. I stood in it a while, just breathing you in.^- Emily
letter.Emily.2: Beloved,^I dreamt we were two stars orbiting the same quiet center. I woke and realized we already are.^- Emily
letter.Emily.3: My love,^The energy in our home hums in a major key these days. That's you. That's us. I'm so grateful.^- Emily
letter.Emily.4: Beloved,^Every color feels truer since you. The universe handed me a fuller spectrum and signed it with your love.^- Emily
letter.Emily.5: My love,^I felt your heartbeat from across the valley yesterday, I swear it. We're woven now, you and I.^- Emily
letter.Emily.6: Beloved,^The moon was generous last night. I made a wish for you on it, though my heart's already had every wish granted.^- Emily
letter.Emily.7: My love,^Wherever your path winds today, know two souls and the whole humming cosmos are cheering you home.^- Emily
letter.Haley.0: Hey you,^Looking cute today, obviously. The house is a mess but I don't even care. ...Okay I care a little. Mostly I just missed you.^- Haley
letter.Haley.1: You,^Come home at a reasonable hour. I made an effort with my hair and someone should appreciate it. ...I mean you. Only you.^- Haley
letter.Haley.2: Hey,^Saw the cutest couple in town and thought, ew, that's literally us now. ...I'm not even mad about it.^- Haley
letter.Haley.3: You,^Quit being so charming all the time, it's exhausting. ...Don't actually quit. I'd miss it. A lot.^- Haley
letter.Haley.4: Hey gorgeous,^I'm framing another photo of us. Don't tell anyone I'm this sappy. ...Okay you can know. Just you.^- Haley
letter.Haley.5: You,^Today's going to be a good day, I can tell. Everything's better when I wake up next to you, even mud season.^- Haley
letter.Haley.6: Hey,^Bring me something pretty if you find it. Or just bring yourself back. ...Honestly the second one's better.^- Haley
letter.Haley.7: You,^People used to say I married down. They were so wrong it's almost funny. You're the best thing about my life.^- Haley
letter.Harvey.0: My dear,^I find myself counting the hours until you return, which is, professionally speaking, a wonderful sort of ailment.^- Harvey
letter.Harvey.1: Dear,^Please remember to eat something today. And to know, throughout it, how deeply you are loved.^- Harvey
letter.Harvey.2: My dear,^A quiet morning, a cup of tea, the thought of you. I require very little else to be content.^- Harvey
letter.Harvey.3: Dear,^I rehearsed something heartfelt to tell you and forgot it entirely when you smiled. The smile said it better.^- Harvey
letter.Harvey.4: My dear,^You have made a careful, cautious man feel quietly brave. I shall never be able to thank you enough.^- Harvey
letter.Harvey.5: Dear,^Do be careful with that machinery today. My heart, as your doctor and your spouse, insists upon it.^- Harvey
letter.Harvey.6: My dear,^The clinic was busy, the day was long, and still the best part was knowing I'd come home to you.^- Harvey
letter.Harvey.7: Dear,^I love you. I've written it plainly, because you deserve plainness as much as poetry. Both are yours.^- Harvey
letter.Leah.0: Hey you,^The light came through the trees this morning all honey and gold, and all I could think was how it'd look on you.^- Leah
letter.Leah.1: Hey,^Woke to the smell of rain and cedar and you, still warm beside me. I'd paint it if I could bottle a morning.^- Leah
letter.Leah.2: You,^The forest is wearing its best colors today. Come walk it with me. I want to watch you notice things.^- Leah
letter.Leah.3: Hey,^Tried to sculpt the curve of your smile and gave up, laughing. Some things you just have to live, not carve.^- Leah
letter.Leah.4: Hey you,^The wine's chilled, the sky's turning peach, and there's a spot in the grass shaped exactly like the two of us.^- Leah
letter.Leah.5: Hey,^I keep a little of you in every piece I make now. The critics call it warmth. I call it you.^- Leah
letter.Leah.6: You,^Cold morning, hot coffee, your handwriting on the grocery list. The whole still life of a life I love.^- Leah
letter.Leah.7: Hey,^I left the city to find something real. Found you instead, which turned out to be the same thing.^- Leah
letter.Maru.0: Hi!^Slept exactly 7.5 hours and woke at peak fondness-for-you levels, which honestly is just my baseline now.^- Maru
letter.Maru.1: Hey you,^Coefficient of how much I missed you while you were in the field yesterday: undefined. It broke the equation.^- Maru
letter.Maru.2: Hi,^Ran the numbers on our compatibility again. Still statistically absurd. Still completely, joyfully real.^- Maru
letter.Maru.3: Hey,^You're my favorite constant. Everything in the lab changes; you're the one value I can always count on.^- Maru
letter.Maru.4: Hi you,^My pulse does a measurable, unscientific thing when you walk in. I've stopped trying to correct for it.^- Maru
letter.Maru.5: Hey,^Built a little something that lights up when you come home. Over-engineered, like my feelings for you.^- Maru
letter.Maru.6: Hi,^Conservation of love: it only ever increases in this house. I've checked. Repeatedly. The data's adorable.^- Maru
letter.Maru.7: Hey you,^The probability we'd ever meet was vanishingly small. So every morning with you feels like winning twice.^- Maru
letter.Penny.0: My dearest,^Another quiet morning, another reason to be grateful. The kettle sang and I thought of you. Come home safe.^Ever yours,^Penny
letter.Penny.1: My love,^I find I write your name in the margins of my books without meaning to. Some habits are too sweet to break.^With all my heart,^Penny
letter.Penny.2: Dearest,^The house is warm and tidy and waiting for you, as am I. Hurry home when you can.^Forever yours,^Penny
letter.Penny.3: My dear,^I never imagined a life this gentle was meant for me. Thank you for making it so, every single day.^All my love,^Penny
letter.Penny.4: My love,^I baked too much again, thinking of you. Come eat. Come rest. Come be loved a while.^Tenderly,^Penny
letter.Penny.5: Dearest,^You are the steady thing I never thought I'd have. I treasure you more than these small words can hold.^Devotedly,^Penny
letter.Penny.6: My darling,^I watched you sleep this morning and could not bear to wake you. My heart is so very full.^Always,^Penny
letter.Penny.7: My love,^Whatever the day brings you, know there is a home and a heart here that are entirely yours.^With deepest affection,^Penny

letter.Sam.1: Hey,^I'm not saying you're the best spouse ever, but the other spouses should stop trying. ...You ARE the best.^- Sam
letter.Sam.2: Babe,^Wrote a song called 'You.' It's just me yelling your name over guitar. Critics are confused. I'm in love.^- Sam
letter.Sam.3: Yo,^Why'd the farmer marry me? For my charming pun-sonality. ...And maybe 'cause I'm crazy about you.^- Sam
letter.Sam.4: Hey,^Missed you so much today it was un-bear-able. ...Vincent told me that one. Anyway, you're my favorite.^- Sam
letter.Sam.5: Babe,^You plus me equals the best band that never plays gigs. Just vibes. Forever. Love ya, seriously.^- Sam
letter.Sam.6: Yo,^Heads up, I rearranged the fridge magnets to say something dumb and sweet. Go look. ...I love you, basically.^- Sam
letter.Sam.7: Hey,^Jokes aside for one sec: marrying you was the smartest thing this goofball ever did. Okay, jokes back on.^- Sam
letter.Sebastian.0: Hey.^Couldn't sleep. Watched the rain. Thought about you the whole time.^- Seb

letter.Sebastian.2: Not good with these.^Just know I'd choose you again. Every time.^- Seb
letter.Sebastian.3: Quiet morning.^You're the only quiet I actually like.^- Seb
letter.Sebastian.4: Hey.^I don't say it enough. So: I love you. There.^- Seb
letter.Sebastian.5: Found a song that reminded me of you.^Track's yours now. Everything is, kind of.^- Seb
letter.Sebastian.6: You looked happy yesterday.^I did that. Felt good.^- Seb
letter.Sebastian.7: Rain again.^Wish you were under it with me.^- Seb
letter.Shane.0: Hey.^Not good at this. But I'm glad it's you. That's the whole letter.^- Shane
letter.Shane.1: You.^Slept okay for once. Think it's 'cause you were there. ...Thanks.^- Shane
letter.Shane.2: Hey.^Don't say it enough. So here it is in writing: I love you.^- Shane
letter.Shane.3: You.^Made it through another rough one. You helped. You always help.^- Shane
letter.Shane.4: Hey.^The chickens like you better. Smart birds. ...Me too.^- Shane
letter.Shane.5: You.^Didn't think I'd get a life like this. Got it 'cause of you.^- Shane
letter.Shane.6: Hey.^Wrote this three times. Kept it simple in the end: you matter. A lot.^- Shane
letter.Shane.7: You.^Whatever I am now, it's better than what I was. That's all you. Thanks.^- Shane
letter.generic.0: My love,^I woke thinking of you and decided to put it in writing. The house is brighter with you in it. Come home soon.^- Your spouse
letter.generic.1: My dear,^Just a small note to say I'm grateful for you. For the ordinary mornings and the quiet nights. All of it.^- Your spouse
letter.generic.2: My love,^Be safe out there today. And know that whatever you face, you don't face it alone. Not anymore.^- Your spouse

makeup.Abigail.resigned: I guess you weren't going to make it right. Fine. I'm over it. Mostly.

makeup.Alex.reconcile: Aw, somethin' sweet? For me? Okay, okay, you win. We're cool. C'mere, champ.
makeup.Alex.resigned: Guess the sorry never came. It's whatever. I'm not gonna hold it forever.

makeup.Elliott.reconcile: Ah, a sweet offering — poetry in edible form. The breach is healed. Come, my dear.
makeup.Elliott.resigned: The apology never arrived. So the chapter closes quietly, as such chapters do.

makeup.Emily.reconcile: You poured yourself into this. I can feel it. My aura's mending already. We're whole again.
makeup.Emily.resigned: The rift just... faded on its own, I suppose. The spirit moves on. So will I.

makeup.Haley.resigned: You never did make it up to me. Whatever. I've decided to be over it. You're lucky I'm generous.

makeup.Harvey.reconcile: You made this yourself? Oh, my. That's... deeply touching. All is forgiven, truly.
makeup.Harvey.resigned: I suppose the matter's simply faded. That's alright. I never could stay upset for long.

makeup.Leah.resigned: Guess you weren't going to come around. That's fine. I've made my peace with it.

makeup.Maru.reconcile: You MADE this? Okay, the numbers just flipped completely positive. Apology accepted. Warmly.
makeup.Maru.resigned: I've recalculated and decided to let it go. No sense running a grudge subroutine forever.
makeup.Penny.hint: It's not about money. Something you made with your own hands would mean everything to me.

makeup.Penny.resigned: I suppose the moment's passed. It's alright. I'm used to letting things go.

makeup.Sam.reconcile: Aw sweet, literally! Okay, we're totally good now. You're the best, you know that?
makeup.Sam.resigned: Eh, the sorry never showed, but it's cool. I can't stay mad, it's not my thing.
makeup.Sebastian.hint: If you actually care... bring me something from outside. Something wild. I'd get that.
makeup.Sebastian.reconcile: Something from out there in the wild. ...Yeah. That's the good stuff. Okay. We're fine.
makeup.Sebastian.resigned: Apology never came. Figures. I'm letting it go anyway. Not worth the headspace.
makeup.Shane.hint: You wanna fix it? Bring me somethin' sweet. Don't laugh — it's the one thing that helps.
makeup.Shane.reconcile: Somethin' sweet, huh. ...Yeah. That actually helps. A lot. Okay. Thanks. We're okay.
makeup.Shane.resigned: The apology never came. Figures. Story of my life. I'll just let it go, like always.
makeup.generic.hint: If you want to make things right between us, bring me something sweet. It would mean a lot.
makeup.generic.reconcile: You brought me something sweet... thank you. That means more than you know. We're okay now.
makeup.generic.resigned: I waited, but the apology never came. I'm letting it go on my own. Let's just move forward.
milestone.Abigail.1: One whole year married to you. Honestly? Best adventure I've ever been on, and that's saying something. Here's to a hundred more.
milestone.Abigail.3: Three years. We've fought monsters and folded laundry and I wouldn't trade a second of it. You're still my favorite person, weirdo.
milestone.Abigail.5: Five years. The girl who dreamed of running away got everything she wanted, right here with you. I love this life. I love you.
milestone.Alex.1: One year, babe. I used to put on this whole tough-guy act. With you I finally get to just... be me. Best year ever.
milestone.Alex.3: Three years married. You saw the real me when nobody else bothered to look. I'm a better man for it. I love you.
milestone.Alex.5: Five years. I went pro at the one thing that matters — loving you. Couldn't have drawn up a better play if I tried.
milestone.Elliott.1: A year, my love — a single, glorious chapter, and already the finest I've ever penned. Here's to the volumes still to come.
milestone.Elliott.3: Three years. I have filled notebooks trying to capture you, and failed beautifully every time. What a privilege, to keep failing forever.
milestone.Elliott.5: Five years. The greatest love story I will ever write is the one I'm living, with you, every ordinary, extraordinary day.
milestone.Emily.1: A year of our spirits intertwined. I felt the universe align the day we wed, and it hasn't stopped humming since.
milestone.Emily.3: Three years. Our auras have grown so deeply woven I can hardly tell where you end and I begin. What a beautiful thing.
milestone.Emily.5: Five years of shared light. The cosmos brought us together, but we're the ones who kept the fire burning. I adore you.
milestone.Haley.1: One year. Ugh, I'm getting emotional and I refuse to cry. ...Okay, maybe a little. You've made this the best year of my life.
milestone.Haley.3: Three years married. I used to think love had to look perfect. Turns out the messy, real version with you is so much better.
milestone.Haley.5: Five years. I'd marry you again tomorrow, in a heartbeat, mud and all. You're the best thing that ever happened to me.
milestone.Harvey.1: One year as your spouse. I, ah... I check my own pulse sometimes when I look at you. It's still racing. Best year of my life.
milestone.Harvey.3: Three years. I worried I was too quiet, too cautious, for someone like you. You've spent three years proving me wrong. Thank you.
milestone.Harvey.5: Five years. Half a decade, and you still make this careful old doctor's heart do something I'd flag as concerning. I love you dearly.
milestone.Leah.1: One year married. I left a whole life to find something real, and I found it with you. Best decision I ever made.
milestone.Leah.3: Three years. You're still my favorite thing to come home to. I've sculpted a hundred things, but nothing as good as this life.
milestone.Leah.5: Five years. Funny — I ran away to be an artist, and you became the masterpiece. I'd choose this, choose you, every single time.
milestone.Maru.1: One year of marriage. I ran the numbers — statistically, this has been the happiest year of my life. The data is conclusive.
milestone.Maru.3: Three years. You're the one variable I could never quantify and never want to. I just love you. Unscientifically. Completely.
milestone.Maru.5: Five years. Half a decade of impossible odds paying off. I'm so glad the universe miscalculated and gave me you.
milestone.Penny.1: A whole year as your spouse... I keep pinching myself. You gave me the stable, loving home I always dreamed of. Thank you.
milestone.Penny.3: Three years together. I used to be so afraid of wanting things. You taught me it was safe to want — and to be wanted. I'm so grateful.
milestone.Penny.5: Five years. Look how far we've come. Whatever I was before, you helped me become someone who feels whole. I love you, completely.
milestone.Sam.1: One year, dude! ...I mean, spouse. One year! I wrote a song about it. It's mostly just your name with a beat. Best year EVER.
milestone.Sam.3: Three years married. You make me wanna be serious about stuff, and that's huge for me. Every plan I've got, you're in it.
milestone.Sam.5: Five years. Half my biggest dreams came true and they were all just... this. You. Our life. I'm the luckiest guy in the valley.
milestone.Sebastian.1: ...One year. I'm bad at this stuff, so just — thank you. For seeing me. For staying. It's been the best year of my life.
milestone.Sebastian.3: Three years. I spent most of my life feeling invisible. You've spent three of them making sure I never feel that way again.
milestone.Sebastian.5: Five years. I don't say much, you know that. So hear this clearly: marrying you is the best thing I've ever done. By far.
milestone.Shane.1: One year. A while back I didn't think I'd get anything good. Then I got you. ...Thanks for not giving up on me. Ever.
milestone.Shane.3: Three years married. Every day with you is one I didn't think I'd live to see, back then. I don't waste a single one.
milestone.Shane.5: Five years. The guy I used to be wouldn't believe this life. A home. A reason. You. ...I'm not gonna screw it up. Promise.
milestone.generic.1: A whole year married to you. It's been the best year of my life, and I can't wait for all the ones still to come.
milestone.generic.3: Three years together. Look at the life we've built. I'd choose you all over again without a moment's hesitation.
milestone.generic.5: Five years. Half a decade of you and me. I love you more today than the day we wed, and that's saying something.
