mood.grumpy.Sebastian: Morning. I'd rather not talk right now, if that's okay. Just one of those days.
mood.grumpy.Shane: ...Morning. I'm not in a great place today. Don't push it, alright?
mood.grumpy.generic: Oh. Morning. I'm not really feeling up to talking right now. Sorry.
mood.happy.Abigail: Hey, you! I had the best dream about us raiding a dungeon together. Today's gonna be great, I can feel it!
mood.happy.Alex: Hey, babe! I'm feelin' on top of the world today. Havin' you around does that, y'know?
mood.happy.Elliott: Ah, good morning, my muse. I woke with poetry in my heart and your name on my lips.
mood.happy.Emily: Mmm, your aura is glowing this morning, and so is mine. The whole house feels warm. I love it.
mood.happy.Haley: Morning, gorgeous. You know what? Life's actually pretty perfect right now. Don't tell anyone I said that.
mood.happy.Harvey: Good morning, dear! I, ah, slept wonderfully. There's something about waking up beside you. It's the best medicine.
mood.happy.Leah: Morning, you. I woke up inspired — might sculpt something just thinking about us. Sappy, I know.
mood.happy.Maru: Good morning! I ran the numbers and you're statistically the best part of my day. Every day. Don't question the data.
mood.happy.Penny: Good morning, sweetheart. Waking up next to you makes everything feel right. I'm so lucky.
mood.happy.Sam: Yo, morning! I'm so stoked today. Honestly? Marrying you was the coolest thing I ever did.
mood.happy.Sebastian: Morning. ...I'm actually in a good mood, which is rare, so enjoy it. It's because of you, obviously.
mood.happy.Shane: Hey. You know, I woke up and actually felt... good. Hopeful, even. That's all you. Thanks.
mood.happy.generic: Good morning, my love! I woke up in such a wonderful mood. It's so good to see your face.
morning.Abigail.High.0: Hey, you! Ready to take on the day? I kinda am.
morning.Abigail.High.1: Morning! I was up late reading about cave monsters. Don't judge.
morning.Abigail.High.2: There's my favorite person. Mornings are better with you around.
morning.Abigail.High.3: Hey! Wanna sneak off on an adventure later? ...A small one. Maybe.
morning.Abigail.Low.0: Morning. I'm gonna do my own thing today.
morning.Abigail.Low.2: Morning. I might head out for a walk later. Alone.
morning.Abigail.Low.3: Oh, morning. I was just messing with my game.
morning.Abigail.VeryHigh.0: Morning, you! I had the best dream about us raiding a dungeon side by side. Let's make today an adventure.
morning.Abigail.VeryHigh.1: Ugh, I love waking up next to you. Don't tell anyone I got this sappy, okay? It's our secret.
morning.Abigail.VeryHigh.2: Hey, my partner in crime. Whatever chaos today brings, we handle it together. Deal?
morning.Abigail.VeryHigh.3: I lay here for ten minutes just watching you sleep. Creepy? Maybe. Worth it? Totally.
morning.Abigail.VeryLow.1: Morning. Don't expect me to be all cheery about it.
morning.Abigail.VeryLow.2: ...Yeah. Hi. I've got nothing to say to you right now.
morning.Alex.High.0: Hey, babe! Feelin' pretty good today. Havin' you here helps, y'know?
morning.Alex.High.1: Morning! You sleep okay? I always sleep better with you next to me.
morning.Alex.High.2: There's my favorite person. C'mon, let's make today a good one.
morning.Alex.High.3: Mornin'. I was thinkin' about you before I even opened my eyes. Weird, huh? Good weird.
morning.Alex.Low.0: Morning. Gonna get a workout in, I think.
morning.Alex.Low.1: Oh, hey. Sleep good? I'm gonna toss the gridball around.
morning.Alex.Low.2: Morning. Got a lot of energy to burn off today.
morning.Alex.Low.3: Hey you. Tryin' to wake up. Gimme a sec.
morning.Alex.VeryHigh.0: Hey, babe! I'm feelin' on top of the world today, and it's all 'cause of you. Every single day.
morning.Alex.VeryHigh.1: I used to put on this whole tough-guy act. With you? I just get to be me. Best feeling there is.
morning.Alex.VeryHigh.2: Morning, gorgeous. C'mere. A day that starts with you is a day I already won.
morning.Alex.VeryHigh.3: I watched you sleep for a sec and got all mushy about it. You make me soft, you know that? I love it.
morning.Alex.VeryLow.0: Yeah. Morning. Not really feelin' it today.
morning.Alex.VeryLow.1: Oh. You're up. Don't take it personal, I just don't wanna talk.
morning.Alex.VeryLow.3: Hey. I got nothing to say right now.
morning.Elliott.High.0: Good morning. I woke with half a verse in mind — you were in it, naturally.
morning.Elliott.High.1: Ah, there you are. A fine morning made finer by your company.
morning.Elliott.High.2: Morning, my dear. The light on the water is lovely, though it pales beside you.
morning.Elliott.High.3: Good morning. Stay a moment — your presence is its own kind of poetry.
morning.Elliott.Low.0: Good morning. I shall be at my writing for much of the day.
morning.Elliott.Low.1: Ah, awake. The sea calls; I may walk its edge a while.
morning.Elliott.Low.2: Morning. A quiet one, I think. The muse keeps her distance.
morning.Elliott.Low.3: Good day to you. I've tea steeping, should you wish some.
morning.Elliott.VeryHigh.0: Ah, good morning, my muse. I woke with poetry in my heart and your name upon my lips.
morning.Elliott.VeryHigh.1: The greatest story I shall ever write is the one I live each morning, waking beside you.
morning.Elliott.VeryHigh.2: Come, sit with me a moment before the day claims you. Let me memorize you in this light.
morning.Elliott.VeryHigh.3: I have filled pages trying to capture you and failed beautifully every time. What joy, to keep failing forever.
morning.Elliott.VeryLow.0: Good morning. Forgive my brevity. The warmth simply isn't in me today.
morning.Elliott.VeryLow.1: Ah. You've risen. I'll not trouble you with words.
morning.Elliott.VeryLow.2: Morning. ...The page is blank, and so, it seems, am I.
morning.Elliott.VeryLow.3: A cold sort of morning. I'd rather be left to it.
morning.Emily.High.0: Good morning! Your aura's lovely and bright today. It's contagious.
morning.Emily.High.1: Morning, you. The whole house hums with good energy when you're near.
morning.Emily.High.2: Hello, love. I dreamt in warm colors last night. I think it was about you.
morning.Emily.High.3: Morning! The spirits are gentle today. A good omen for us.
morning.Emily.Low.0: Morning. The crystals say it'll be an ordinary sort of day.
morning.Emily.Low.1: Oh, hello. I had odd dreams. Nothing to share, really.
morning.Emily.Low.2: Good morning. I'll be sewing something today, I think.
morning.Emily.Low.3: Morning. The colors feel muted today. It happens.
morning.Emily.VeryHigh.0: Mmm, your aura is glowing this morning, and so is mine. Our energies are so woven I can hardly tell them apart.
morning.Emily.VeryHigh.1: I felt the universe align the moment I woke beside you. That hum? That's us, my love.
morning.Emily.VeryHigh.2: Good morning, beloved. The light pouring in this morning is nothing next to you.
morning.Emily.VeryHigh.3: I danced a little while you slept. The spirits insisted. They're happy for us, you know.
morning.Emily.VeryLow.0: Morning. My aura's all tangled. I need space.
morning.Emily.VeryLow.1: Oh. You're up. The energy in here feels... off.
morning.Emily.VeryLow.2: ...Morning. I can't read you lately. I'm not sure I want to.
morning.Haley.High.0: Morning, gorgeous. You actually look pretty good today, you know.
morning.Haley.High.1: Hey you. I'm in a good mood, so enjoy it while it lasts.
morning.Haley.High.2: Morning! I was thinking I'd take some photos of the farm. Of us, maybe.
morning.Haley.High.3: There you are. Mornings used to be boring. Not anymore.
morning.Haley.Low.0: Morning. I've got photos to sort, so... yeah.
morning.Haley.Low.1: Oh, hi. Try not to track mud in today, please.
morning.Haley.Low.2: Morning. I might go take some pictures later.
morning.Haley.VeryHigh.0: Morning, gorgeous. Life's actually pretty perfect right now. Don't tell anyone I admitted it.
morning.Haley.VeryHigh.1: I took a photo of you sleeping. You looked so sweet I couldn't help it. It's MINE, you can't have it.
morning.Haley.VeryHigh.2: Ugh, I love you. There, I said it first thing in the morning. That's how you know I mean it.
morning.Haley.VeryHigh.3: Come here and kiss me before you go play farmer. I need my morning dose of you.
morning.Haley.VeryLow.0: Ugh. Morning. Don't even look at me right now.
morning.Haley.VeryLow.1: Oh, it's you. Great. Just... give me space.
morning.Haley.VeryLow.2: Morning. I'm not in the mood, okay?
morning.Haley.VeryLow.3: Whatever. I have nothing to say to you.
morning.Harvey.High.0: Good morning, dear! I slept well — there's something about you being near.
morning.Harvey.High.1: Morning! I, ah, find myself smiling before I'm even fully awake these days.
morning.Harvey.High.2: There you are. Do be careful out on the farm today. For my peace of mind.
morning.Harvey.High.3: Good morning. A cup of coffee and your face — the best start I could ask for.
morning.Harvey.Low.0: Good morning. I've some paperwork from the clinic to see to.
morning.Harvey.Low.1: Oh, hello. Did you sleep enough? Rest is important, you know.
morning.Harvey.Low.2: Morning. I'll be reviewing some medical journals today.
morning.Harvey.Low.3: Good morning. There's coffee, though perhaps go easy on it.
morning.Harvey.VeryHigh.0: Good morning, dear! I slept wonderfully. There's something about waking beside you — it's the best medicine I know.
morning.Harvey.VeryHigh.1: I, ah, check my own pulse some mornings, just looking at you. Still racing. After all this time.
morning.Harvey.VeryHigh.2: Come here a moment before you go. ...Doctor's orders. A kiss does wonders for the heart, you see.
morning.Harvey.VeryHigh.3: I worried I was too quiet, too careful, for someone like you. Every morning with you proves me wrong. Thank you.
morning.Harvey.VeryLow.0: Oh. Good morning. I'm, ah, not quite myself. Best give me room.
morning.Harvey.VeryLow.1: Morning. I'd rather not get into it right now.
morning.Harvey.VeryLow.2: ...Hello. I didn't rest well. I'll keep to myself.
morning.Harvey.VeryLow.3: Good morning. Forgive me, I'm out of sorts.
morning.Leah.High.0: Morning, you. I woke up wanting to sculpt something. Funny how that happens around you.
morning.Leah.High.1: Hey. The farm looks beautiful in this light. So do you, honestly.
morning.Leah.High.2: Morning! Come by the studio later if you get a minute. I'd like the company.
morning.Leah.High.3: There you are. Best part of my morning, seeing you stumble out of bed.
morning.Leah.Low.0: Morning. I'll be out at the studio most of the day.
morning.Leah.Low.1: Oh, hey. Sleep alright? I'm gonna get to work.
morning.Leah.Low.2: Morning. The light's good today — gonna sketch a while.
morning.Leah.Low.3: Hey you. Coffee's on, if you want it.
morning.Leah.VeryHigh.0: Morning, you. I woke up inspired — might sculpt something just from thinking about us. Sappy, I know.
morning.Leah.VeryHigh.1: I left a whole life behind to find something real. I found it. It's you, it's here, it's this.
morning.Leah.VeryHigh.2: Come here. Five minutes, just us, before the day swallows us up. I want to remember this morning.
morning.Leah.VeryHigh.3: I'd choose this life — you, this farm, these quiet mornings — every single time, without thinking twice.
morning.Leah.VeryLow.0: Morning. ...Yeah. Just leave me to my work.
morning.Leah.VeryLow.2: Morning. I'm not really feeling talkative.
morning.Leah.VeryLow.3: Hey. ...I've got nothing for you today.
morning.Maru.High.0: Good morning! I ran some quick math — you're a solid highlight of my day.
morning.Maru.High.1: Morning, you. I had an idea for an invention while watching you sleep. Don't ask.
morning.Maru.High.2: Hey! The data's clear: mornings are better with you in them.
morning.Maru.High.3: Morning. Come find me later — I work better knowing you're around.
morning.Maru.Low.0: Morning. I've got a project I want to tinker with today.
morning.Maru.Low.1: Oh, hello. Did you sleep enough? Statistically, you don't.
morning.Maru.Low.2: Morning. I'll be at the workbench if you need me.
morning.Maru.Low.3: Hey. Coffee's optimal temperature right now. Just so you know.
morning.Maru.VeryHigh.0: Good morning! I ran the numbers and you're statistically the best part of my life. Every day. Don't question the data.
morning.Maru.VeryHigh.1: You're the one variable I could never quantify, and I've stopped trying. I just love you. Completely.
morning.Maru.VeryHigh.2: Morning, my love. I lay awake calculating how lucky I am. The result kept overflowing.
morning.Maru.VeryHigh.3: Come here before you go. A kiss measurably improves my entire day. It's science. Indulge me.
morning.Maru.VeryLow.0: Oh. You're up. I've got a lot on my mind, so... later.
morning.Maru.VeryLow.1: Morning. I'd rather focus on my work right now.
morning.Maru.VeryLow.2: ...Hi. I'm not in a talking mood. Sorry.
morning.Maru.VeryLow.3: Morning. Let's just get through the day, okay?
morning.Penny.High.0: Good morning, dear. It's so nice to start the day with you.
morning.Penny.High.1: Morning! I put the kettle on already. I know how you like it.
morning.Penny.High.2: There you are. The house always feels brighter once you're up.
morning.Penny.High.3: Good morning. I was just thinking how lucky I am to be here.
morning.Penny.Low.0: Good morning. I hope your day goes smoothly.
morning.Penny.Low.1: Morning. I'll tidy up around here while you're out.
morning.Penny.Low.2: Oh, you're awake. I made tea, if you want some.
morning.Penny.Low.3: Morning. I've got some reading to catch up on today.
morning.Penny.VeryHigh.0: Good morning, sweetheart. Waking up beside you makes everything in the world feel right.
morning.Penny.VeryHigh.1: I used to dream of a home like this. Quiet, safe, full of love. You gave me that. Thank you.
morning.Penny.VeryHigh.2: Morning, my love. Come find me before you head out — even a moment with you sets my whole day right.
morning.Penny.VeryHigh.3: I watched the sunrise from the window and all I could think about was how grateful I am for you.
morning.Penny.VeryLow.0: ...Good morning. I'd rather not talk right now.
morning.Penny.VeryLow.1: Oh. Morning. I'll keep out of your way.
morning.Penny.VeryLow.3: Hello. I didn't sleep well. I won't bother you.
morning.Sam.High.0: Yo, morning! I'm feelin' pretty good today. You do that, y'know?
morning.Sam.High.1: Hey! I had a song stuck in my head all morning. Might be about you. Probably is.
morning.Sam.High.2: Mornin', you! Let's make today awesome. I'm in the mood for awesome.
morning.Sam.High.3: There's my favorite person. Mornings don't suck anymore. That's a you thing.
morning.Sam.Low.0: Morning. Gonna mess around with my guitar later, I guess.
morning.Sam.Low.1: Oh, hey. Sleep okay? I'm still kinda waking up.
morning.Sam.Low.2: Mornin'. Might hit up the skate spot today.
morning.Sam.Low.3: Hey you. There's cereal if you want. Living the dream.
morning.Sam.VeryHigh.0: Yo, morning! I'm so stoked today. Honestly? Marrying you was the coolest thing I've ever done. By a mile.
morning.Sam.VeryHigh.1: I wrote a song about waking up next to you. It's mostly just your name with a sick beat. It's a banger, trust me.
morning.Sam.VeryHigh.2: C'mere, gimme a kiss before you go save the farm. Best part of my whole day, right here.
morning.Sam.VeryHigh.3: I just laid here grinnin' like an idiot watching you sleep. You make me dumb-happy. I love it.
morning.Sam.VeryLow.0: Hey. ...Yeah, I'm kinda in a funk. Don't worry about it.
morning.Sam.VeryLow.1: Oh. Mornin'. I'm just gonna keep to myself today.
morning.Sam.VeryLow.2: ...Hey. Not really in a talking place right now.
morning.Sam.VeryLow.3: Morning. Eh. Just one of those days.
morning.Sebastian.High.0: Morning. ...I slept good, actually. That's kind of your fault.
morning.Sebastian.High.1: Hey, you. The quiet mornings out here? I didn't know I needed them. Or you.
morning.Sebastian.High.2: Morning. Come find me later. I, uh, like having you around. There, I said it.
morning.Sebastian.High.3: Hey. Rainy morning. My favorite. Even better with you here.
morning.Sebastian.Low.0: Morning. Got some code I want to work on today.
morning.Sebastian.Low.1: Oh, hey. Sleep okay? I'll be at my computer.
morning.Sebastian.Low.2: Morning. Might take the bike out later. We'll see.
morning.Sebastian.Low.3: Hey. Coffee's there. I'm still booting up, basically.
morning.Sebastian.VeryHigh.0: Morning. I'm actually in a good mood, which is rare, so enjoy it. ...It's because of you. Obviously.
morning.Sebastian.VeryHigh.1: I spent most of my life feeling invisible. You wake up every day and make sure I never feel that way again.
morning.Sebastian.VeryHigh.2: C'mere before you go. I'm not good with words this early — or ever — so just... let me show you instead.
morning.Sebastian.VeryHigh.3: I watched the rain with you still asleep on my arm and thought, yeah. This is it. This is the good life.
morning.Sebastian.VeryLow.0: Morning. I'd rather not talk right now, if that's okay.
morning.Sebastian.VeryLow.1: ...Hey. Just one of those days. Leave me to it.
morning.Sebastian.VeryLow.2: Oh. You're up. I'm gonna be in the basement.
morning.Sebastian.VeryLow.3: Morning. Don't really have anything to say.
morning.Shane.High.0: Hey. Slept decent for once. Think it's 'cause you're here.
morning.Shane.High.1: Morning. Gonna go say hi to the chickens. ...You can come, if you want.
morning.Shane.High.2: There you are. Mornings are easier with you around. Didn't expect that.
morning.Shane.High.3: Hey, you. Woke up and you were the first thing on my mind. Not the worst way to start.
morning.Shane.Low.0: Morning. Gotta go check on the chickens.
morning.Shane.Low.1: Oh, hey. Sleep alright? I'm draggin' a bit.
morning.Shane.Low.2: Morning. Gonna be a long day. Let's just get to it.
morning.Shane.Low.3: Hey you. There's coffee. Strong, the way I need it.
morning.Shane.VeryHigh.0: Hey. You know, I woke up and actually felt good. Hopeful, even. That's all you. ...Thanks. For everything.
morning.Shane.VeryHigh.1: A while back I figured I'd never get anything good in this life. Then I got you. Still can't believe it some mornings.
morning.Shane.VeryHigh.2: C'mere before you head out. I'm bad at this stuff, so just — let me hold onto you a second, okay?
morning.Shane.VeryHigh.3: Every morning I wake up and you're still here is one the old me wouldn't have believed. I don't waste a single one.
morning.Shane.VeryLow.0: ...Morning. I'm not in a great place today. Don't push it.
morning.Shane.VeryLow.1: Oh. You're up. Yeah. I'm just gonna keep to myself.
morning.Shane.VeryLow.2: Morning. Don't got much to say. Sorry.
morning.Shane.VeryLow.3: Hey. ...It's one of those mornings. Leave it.
morning.generic.High.0: Good morning! It's so nice to start the day with you.
morning.generic.High.1: Morning, you. The house feels brighter once you're up.
morning.generic.High.2: There you are. Come find me later, would you?
morning.generic.High.3: Good morning. Be safe out there — and hurry home.
morning.generic.Low.0: Good morning. I'll be keeping busy today.
morning.generic.Low.1: Oh, hello. Did you sleep alright? I'll be around.
morning.generic.Low.2: Morning. There's coffee, if you want some.
morning.generic.Low.3: Good morning. Try to take it easy out there.
morning.generic.VeryHigh.0: Good morning, my love. Waking up beside you makes everything feel right.
morning.generic.VeryHigh.1: There's nowhere I'd rather be than right here, with you, every single morning.
morning.generic.VeryHigh.2: Come give me a kiss before you head out. Even a moment with you sets my whole day right.
morning.generic.VeryHigh.3: I lay here just watching you sleep this morning. I'm the luckiest person in the valley.
morning.generic.VeryLow.0: Oh. Morning. I'm not really up for talking right now.
morning.generic.VeryLow.1: ...Morning. Just give me some space today, okay?
morning.generic.VeryLow.2: You're up. Yeah. I've got nothing to say.
morning.generic.VeryLow.3: Morning. I didn't sleep well. I'd rather be left alone.
quest.title: {0}'s Request
request.abby_amethyst.note: Hey adventurer,^Bring me an amethyst, would you? Purple's my color and you know it. Bonus points if you pulled it out of the ground yourself. ;)^- Abigail
request.abby_amethyst.thank: An amethyst! My favorite. You get me, you really do. Okay, you've earned a kiss. Get over here.
request.abby_late.note: You,^Stay up late with me tonight. No farm talk, no responsibilities. Just us and the dark and bad ideas. Come on. You know you want to.^- Abigail
request.abby_late.thank: You stayed up with me. Knew you would. These are my favorite hours, and you're my favorite person. Don't tell anyone I'm this soft.
request.abby_mines.note: Hey,^Let's do something together, just us — meet me and we'll cause a little trouble. I've got energy to burn and I want you with me. Don't leave me hanging.^- Abigail
request.abby_mines.thank: There you are! Just us against the world for a bit. THIS is what I married you for. Best.
request.alex_beach.note: Babe,^Let's hit the beach together, just us. Toss a ball around, watch the water. I like showin' you off, not gonna lie.^- Alex
request.alex_beach.thank: Beach day with you. Doesn't get better. I'm the luckiest guy in the valley and everybody knows it. Thanks, babe.
request.alex_gift.note: Hey,^Bring me a little somethin', anything from you, today? Dunno why, just been missin' you. Don't make it weird. ...Okay it's a little weird. Do it anyway.^- Alex
request.alex_gift.thank: You brought me somethin'. ...Man. That got me. Thanks, babe. Means more than I can say without gettin' mushy.
request.alex_meal.note: Hey babe,^Cook me up something, would ya? An athlete's gotta eat, and your cooking beats anything. Plus I just like stuff you made for me.^- Alex
request.alex_meal.thank: You cooked for me? Aw, babe. Tastes even better knowin' you made it. Thanks. You're the best.
request.elliott_docks.note: My love,^Walk with me down by the water sometime soon? The sea and I have much to say, and it all sounds finer with you beside me.^- Elliott
request.elliott_docks.thank: The tide, the salt air, and you. The perfect trio. My heart is full and my next chapter, assured. Thank you.
request.elliott_inspire.note: Darling,^Bring me something — anything — that stirred a thought in you today. I wish to see the world through your eyes. It's where I find my best lines.^- Elliott
request.elliott_inspire.thank: You brought me a piece of your day, your thoughts. That's worth more than any treasure. You inspire me endlessly.
request.elliott_pom.note: My darling,^Might you bring me a pomegranate? Its jeweled seeds inspire me endlessly, and the thought of sharing one with you inspires me more.^- Elliott
request.elliott_pom.reward: It's finished — the piece your pomegranate stirred in me. I had it bound, just one copy, just for you. A little book about loving and being loved. Read it knowing every word is yours.
request.elliott_pom.thank: A pomegranate, ruby and resplendent! And from your hand. I shall write something glorious. Thank you, my muse.
request.emily_cloth.note: Beloved,^Would you bring me some cloth? I feel a creation calling to me, and I want to weave a little of our energy into it. Whenever the universe allows.^- Emily
request.emily_cloth.reward: The weaving became this — I sewed you a shirt, and dyed it by hand with colors that felt like us. Wear it out in the fields, beloved, and a little piece of me goes with you everywhere.
request.emily_cloth.thank: Cloth! I can already feel what it wants to become. A piece of us, woven together. Thank you, my love.
request.emily_gem.note: My love,^A gemstone is calling to me — its energy would be perfect for what I'm sensing. Would you bring me one? The crystals will thank you.^- Emily
request.emily_gem.thank: Oh, its energy is humming! Perfect. You always find exactly what the moment needs. Thank you, beloved.
request.emily_meditate.note: Beloved,^Sit and breathe with me today? Just the two of us, aligning our energy. I miss the quiet hum of being still beside you.^- Emily
request.emily_meditate.thank: Our energies, perfectly in sync. I feel centered for the first time in days. Thank you for being still with me.
request.gen_flower.note: My love,^Would you bring me a flower? Something pretty to brighten the house and remind me of you.^- Your spouse
request.gen_flower.thank: A flower, just because. You always know how to make a day brighter. Thank you.
request.gen_forage.note: My love,^Bring me something you foraged out there, would you? A little piece of the world, gathered with me in mind.^- Your spouse
request.gen_forage.thank: Something from the wild, gathered for me. That's so thoughtful. Thank you.
request.gen_gem.note: My love,^Would you bring me a gemstone? Something that caught your eye and made you think of me.^- Your spouse
request.gen_gem.thank: A gem that made you think of me. I'll treasure it. Thank you.
request.gen_meal.note: My love,^Would you make me a home-cooked meal sometime soon? Being fed by you is one of my favorite things.^- Your spouse
request.gen_meal.thank: A meal made by your hands. There's nothing better. Thank you, my love.
request.gen_time.note: My love,^Would you spend a little time with me today? I just miss being near you. That's all.^- Your spouse
request.gen_time.thank: Just having you near is all I ever really want. Thank you for the time, my love.
request.haley_beach.note: You,^Take me to the beach sometime soon, okay? I want sun and pretty views and you carrying my stuff. It'll be adorable. Don't argue.^- Haley
request.haley_beach.thank: The beach with you... okay, that was actually perfect. I got the cutest mental picture of us. Thank you, gorgeous.
request.haley_gold.note: Hey,^Bring me something gold-colored and shiny. I have refined taste and you knew that when you married me. Spoil me a little. xoxo^- Haley
request.haley_gold.thank: Ooh, shiny. You spoil me and I love it. ...And you. I love you. There, I said it. Happy?
request.haley_sunflower.note: Hey gorgeous,^Bring me a sunflower, would you? They're cheerful and pretty and they remind me of summer. And of you, kind of. Don't read into that.^- Haley
request.haley_sunflower.thank: A sunflower! It's perfect. You're so getting a kiss for this. Ugh, you're too cute. Stop it.
request.harvey_coffee.note: My dear,^Would you bring me a coffee? I've a long day ahead and the thought of a cup from you would carry me through it splendidly.^- Harvey
request.harvey_coffee.thank: Coffee — and from you, no less. My day is immeasurably improved. Thank you, dear. You take such good care of me.
request.harvey_meal.note: My dear,^Would you make me a wholesome meal? As a doctor I really ought to eat better, and as your spouse, I'd much rather you fed me. A win-win.^- Harvey
request.harvey_meal.thank: A proper meal, made with care. Doctor's orders followed at last — and so lovingly. Thank you, my dear.
request.harvey_walk.note: Dear,^Would you take a walk with me through town sometime? Nothing in particular — just your company and the fresh air. It does wonders for the heart.^- Harvey
request.harvey_walk.thank: A simple walk, your hand in mine. The best medicine I know. Thank you for the time, my love.
request.leah_forage.note: Hey you,^Bring me something foraged, would you? A bit of the wild for inspiration. Something you found out there, thinking of me. That's the good stuff.^- Leah
request.leah_forage.thank: Something straight from the wild — and you thought of me. That's the most romantic thing, honestly. Thank you.
request.leah_salad.note: You,^I'm craving a fresh salad and I'm too deep in a sculpture to make one. Would you whip one up for me? Rustic and good, the way I like it.^- Leah
request.leah_salad.thank: A salad, made by you. Simple and perfect, just like this life. Thank you, love.
request.leah_studio.note: Hey,^Come spend some time in the studio with me? You're the only person I let watch me work, and lately I just want you near while I create.^- Leah
request.leah_studio.thank: You sat with me while I worked. You're the only one I let do that, you know. It means everything. Thank you.
request.maru_clinic.note: Hi you,^Would you come spend some time with me at home today? I've been heads-down in work and I miss your face. That's a documented condition, by the way.^- Maru
request.maru_clinic.thank: You came! My focus is shot now, in the best way. Thank you for the company. You're my favorite distraction.
request.maru_gem.note: Hi!^I'm running an experiment and I need a good gemstone for it. Could you bring me one when you get the chance? For science. And, okay, a little for the excuse to see you.^- Maru
request.maru_gem.thank: A gem! Perfect specimen. My experiment AND my heart rate just improved. Thank you, you wonderful variable.
request.maru_quartz.note: Hey,^I could really use some refined quartz for a project I'm building. Would you bring me some? I promise to explain the whole thing in exhausting, loving detail.^- Maru
request.maru_quartz.reward: It's finished! Remember that refined quartz you brought me? It's humming away inside this little beauty now — a sprinkler I tuned myself. It's yours. Go let it do your watering for you. The data says you work too hard.
request.maru_quartz.thank: Refined quartz! Exactly what I needed. The prototype lives. So does my enormous crush on you. Thank you!
request.penny_book.note: My dearest,^I've been longing for a new story to lose myself in. Would you bring me a book sometime soon? Curling up with one beside you sounds perfect.^- Penny
request.penny_book.thank: A new book! Oh, you remembered. I'm going to read every page beside you. Thank you, truly.
request.penny_library.note: Sweetheart,^Would you spend a little time with me at home, away from the fields? Just us, somewhere quiet. I miss simply being near you.^- Penny
request.penny_library.thank: Just having you here with me, no rush, no fields... this is all I ever wanted. Thank you for the time.
request.penny_meal.note: My love,^I'd so love a home-cooked meal from your hands. There's something about being cared for that I never quite get used to. Whenever you can.^- Penny
request.penny_meal.thank: You cooked this for me? I... thank you. Being looked after by you means more than I can say.
request.sam_game.note: Dude,^Let's hang out and just goof around today, yeah? Games, music, whatever. I miss messing around with you. Make some time?^- Sam
request.sam_game.thank: Best time. Seriously. Doesn't matter what we do as long as it's with you. Thanks for hanging, superstar.
request.sam_pizza.note: Yo!^I am CRAVING pizza so bad it's unreal. Bring me a pizza and you're officially my favorite person forever. (You already are. But still.)^- Sam
request.sam_pizza.thank: PIZZA! You absolute legend. Best spouse in the valley, no contest. C'mere, I'm sharing. ...A little.
request.sam_practice.note: Hey,^I've been working on a new song and I really want you to hear it. Come hang with me today? Your opinion's the only one that actually matters.^- Sam
request.sam_practice.thank: You came to hear it! Okay that means a ton. You're my whole audience and my favorite person. Thanks, seriously.
request.seb_late.note: Hey,^Stay up late with me tonight? Just us and the quiet and maybe a game. I do my best talking when the rest of the world's asleep. Come find me.^- Sebastian
request.seb_late.thank: You stayed up with me. The quiet hours are the only ones I really like. ...They're better with you. Thanks.
request.seb_part.note: Hey,^I need a component for a build I'm working on. Bring me a refined quartz? Don't ask what it does. ...Okay you can ask. I'll explain everything. Loudly.^- Sebastian
request.seb_part.reward: Hey. That build I was working on? Done. ...I made you one too. It's a jukebox. Now you can play our music wherever you want. Don't make a thing of it. ...Okay, maybe make a little thing of it.
request.seb_part.thank: Perfect part. The build's gonna work now. ...And I get to ramble at you about it. Win-win. Thanks.
request.seb_tear.note: Hey,^Bring me a frozen tear if you find one in the caves? They're kind of perfect — cold and quiet and they catch the light. Reminds me of good things. Like you.^- Sebastian
request.seb_tear.thank: A frozen tear. ...You actually found one. That's — yeah. Thanks. I'll keep it. Right where I'll see it.
request.shane_meal.note: Hey,^Cook me somethin' homemade? I, uh — I like eatin' stuff you made. Feels like bein' taken care of. Not somethin' I'm used to. So. Yeah.^- Shane
request.shane_meal.thank: You cooked for me. ...Nobody used to do that. Feels good. Real good. Thanks. I mean it.
request.shane_popper.note: Hey,^Bring me some pepper poppers, would ya? It's stupid, but it's my comfort food. And one made by you would hit different. Don't make it a thing.^- Shane
request.shane_popper.thank: Pepper poppers. From you. ...Okay that actually got me. Thanks. Means more than it should. C'mere.
request.shane_ranch.note: Hey,^Come by and spend some time with me, would ya? Watch the animals, do nothin' in particular. The quiet's better when you're in it.^- Shane
request.shane_ranch.thank: You came by. The chickens missed you. ...I missed you. There, I said it. Don't make it weird. Thanks.
season.favorite.0: This is my favorite time of year, you know. Everything just feels a little brighter with you.
season.favorite.1: I love this season. I'm in such a good mood I could kiss you. ...So I might.
season.favorite.2: Something about this time of year makes me fall for you all over again.
season.favorite.3: Perfect weather, perfect company. I'm exactly where I want to be.
season.least.0: This season always puts me in a bit of a funk. ...A little extra attention wouldn't hurt.
season.least.1: I'm not at my best this time of year. Be patient with me?
season.least.2: I get kind of low this season. Just having you around helps more than you know.
sick.Abigail.grateful: Aw, you brought me medicine? My hero. Okay, that actually made me feel a lot better. Thanks, you.
sick.Abigail.sick: Ugh, I'm sick. Of all the dumb, boring ways to be taken down. Not a monster, not a cave-in — a sniffle. Lame. Staying in bed.
sick.Abigail.tired: Still kinda wrecked from being sick. Slow day for me. ...But thanks for yesterday. You're alright, you know that?
sick.Alex.grateful: You took care of me? That's... that's real nice. Thanks. Nobody's done that for me in a long time.
sick.Alex.sick: Man, I'm sick. Big tough gridball guy taken out by a cold. Don't tell the guys. I'll just... be in bed. Ugh.
sick.Alex.tired: Still feelin' rough. Gonna take it slow today. ...Hey. Thanks for yesterday. Meant a lot.
sick.Elliott.grateful: You brought a remedy to your ailing poet. I am moved. The cure is good; the gesture, immeasurable. Thank you, my love.
sick.Elliott.sick: Alas, I am felled — not by drama this time, but by a common malady. I shall convalesce dramatically in bed. Forgive my absence.
sick.Elliott.tired: Still weak as wet parchment, I'm afraid. The pen waits another day. ...Your kindness yesterday will not be forgotten.
sick.Emily.grateful: You brought me something warm and healing. I can feel my aura brightening already. Thank you, truly.
sick.Emily.sick: My energy's all clouded and grey today. I think I'm sick. The spirits want me to rest, so... I'll listen. Bed it is.
sick.Emily.tired: Still recovering my energy. The colors are dim but mending. Thank you for tending to me.
sick.Haley.grateful: You brought me something? Ugh, you're going to make me cry, and I'm already a mess. ...Thank you. You're the best.
sick.Haley.sick: I am DYING. This is the worst thing that has ever happened to anyone. Look at me. I'm a disaster. Don't look at me.
sick.Haley.tired: Still feeling gross and tragic. Don't expect me to be charming today. ...Thanks for taking care of me, though.
sick.Harvey.grateful: You brought me a remedy? Following doctor's orders better than I do. ...Thank you. It means more than the medicine.
sick.Harvey.sick: I have diagnosed myself with, ah, definitely-not-dying. I'm a terrible patient, I know. I'll stay in bed and sulk about it.
sick.Harvey.tired: Recovering. Slowly. Turns out doctors make the worst patients. Bear with me another day.
sick.Leah.grateful: You came through for me. That's... really sweet. Thank you. I'll paint you something when I can hold a brush again.
sick.Leah.sick: I think I caught something. Everything aches and I can't even hold a brush. I'll just stay in today. Don't fuss.
sick.Leah.tired: Still run down. Going to take it easy today. ...Thanks for looking after me, by the way.
sick.Maru.grateful: You brought the optimal remedy! And you. Mostly you. ...My recovery time just improved dramatically. Thank you.
sick.Maru.sick: Running a fever — I'd estimate a degree and a half above baseline. Translation: I feel awful. Staying in bed for the data.
sick.Maru.tired: Still operating below capacity. Recovery's ongoing. Thanks for the care yesterday — measurably effective.
sick.Penny.grateful: You took care of me... I'm not used to that. Being looked after. Thank you. I don't deserve someone so kind.
sick.Penny.sick: Oh no, I've gone and gotten sick, and now I'm just a burden. I'm so sorry. Don't trouble yourself over me, please.
sick.Penny.tired: Still a bit weak, I'm afraid. I'm sorry to be slow today. ...Thank you for yesterday. Truly.
sick.Sam.grateful: Dude, you brought me stuff to feel better? You're the best. Seriously. I'll write you a get-well song. ...Later. When I can think.
sick.Sam.sick: Bleh, I'm sick. Total bummer. Can't even play guitar, my head's all fuzzy. Gonna stay in bed and feel sorry for myself.
sick.Sam.tired: Still kinda out of it. Low energy today. ...Thanks for takin' care of me though. You rule.
sick.Sebastian.grateful: You actually brought me something. ...Most people would've just left me down here. Thanks. It — yeah. Thanks.
sick.Sebastian.sick: ...I'm sick. Don't want to talk about it. Just gonna stay in bed in the dark. Leave the fussing to someone else, okay?
sick.Sebastian.tired: Still feeling like garbage. Gonna be quiet today. ...What you did yesterday. I noticed. Thank you.
sick.Shane.grateful: You didn't have to do that. ...But you did. For me. Thanks. Really. I'm not used to people bothering.
sick.Shane.sick: It's nothing. I'm fine. ...Okay I'm not fine, I feel like garbage, but don't make a thing of it. I'll just stay in bed.
sick.Shane.tired: Still wiped out from being sick. Give me a day. ...And thanks again. For before.
sick.generic.grateful: You brought me something to feel better... thank you. Being cared for like this means more than you know.
sick.generic.sick: I'm not feeling well at all today. I think I'd better stay in bed. Could you bring me something to help, maybe?
sick.generic.tired: Still feeling a little worn out from being sick. I'll be slow today. Thank you for looking after me.

visitor.Abigail: So {visitor} was hanging around our farm yesterday, huh. ...I'm not jealous. I could just take 'em in a fight, that's all.
visitor.Alex: {visitor} was on our farm yesterday, huh? ...I'm cooler than them, right? Right.
visitor.Elliott: Ah, so {visitor} darkened our doorstep yesterday. Should I be composing a tragic ballad of betrayal? ...I jest. Mostly.
visitor.Emily: {visitor}'s energy was all over the farm yesterday. I don't mind sharing the space... mostly.
visitor.Haley: Oh, {visitor} was here yesterday? How nice. ...You don't need to spend THAT long with them, though.
visitor.Harvey: I, ah, noticed {visitor} visiting yesterday. Not that it's my business who comes by! Forget I mentioned it. ...But I did notice.
visitor.Leah: Saw {visitor} out here yesterday. Just don't go finding them more interesting than me, alright?
visitor.Maru: {visitor} was here a suspiciously long time yesterday. I ran the numbers. The numbers say I'm a little jealous.
visitor.Penny: I, um, noticed {visitor} visiting yesterday. It's silly, but I did wonder why they needed so much of your time.
visitor.Sam: Yo, {visitor} was here forever yesterday. Should I be worried? Nah. ...Should I, though?
visitor.Sebastian: {visitor} was around yesterday. ...Whatever. Just noticed. That's all.
visitor.Shane: {visitor} was sniffin' around the farm yesterday. Tch. ...Just keep 'em away from my chickens. And you.
visitor.generic: I noticed {visitor} spending a lot of time on our farm yesterday. ...No reason. Just noticed, is all.
